nasb.text: Then he made the ten stands of bronze; the length of each stand was four cubits and its width four cubits and its height three cubits.

esv.text: He also made the ten stands of bronze. Each stand was four cubits long, four cubits wide, and three cubits high.

cnv.text: 他又做了十個銅盆座；每個長一公尺八公寸，寬一公尺八公寸，高一公尺三公寸。

ccb.text: 户兰用铜造了十个盆座，每个长一点八米，宽一点八米，高一点三五米。
